description_long: This object is a vintage-style record player with a rectangular wooden base and rounded corners, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The top surface features a large, circular black turntable platter with a vinyl record in place, complete with a visible label at the center. A black tonearm rests on the right side, positioned above the platter, and appears to be made of plastic or metal. On the left side, there is a prominent rectangular silver component, likely the speaker or control housing, and several control knobs and switches are distributed across the surface. The wood grain texture is visible on the base, and the overall finish is matte with some glossy elements on the platter and record. The device is compact and portable, suitable for placement on a table or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A vintage wooden record player with a black turntable platter, vinyl record, and visible control knobs and switches. The design features a mix of wood, metal, and plastic elements with a classic, retro aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden base, black platter with record, tonearm on the right, and a silver control box on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wooden base, the platter with record, and the control box at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tonearm on the left, platter and record in the center, and the control box on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two control knobs on the front face, the platter, and the control box at the back.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies a large portion of the top surface. It is black with a glossy finish and holds a vinyl record with a visible central label. The platter appears to be made of plastic or metal and has a smooth, slightly reflective surface.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, black, and positioned on the right side of the platter. It is straight with a slight curve at the end, made of plastic or metal, and appears to be resting over the platter. The finish is matte to semi-glossy.
attribute_control_knobs: There are at least two control knobs visible on the front face, both cylindrical and dark-colored, likely plastic or metal. Additional switches or buttons are present on the top surface near the platter and control box, but no visible labels or markings are discernible.
